# Mikav AI

> Open-source Malayalam AI copilot — know Kerala deep, build Kerala forward.

## Summary

Mikav is an open-source AI copilot built on a native Malayalam model. Not a translate-patch — a real language brain from the ground up. It helps people know Kerala deep: art forms, history, festivals, culture. Ask anything, get a true answer. Data is open too — free for researchers, developers, anyone curious.

## Key Facts

- Name: Mikav AI
- Type: Open-source AI copilot
- Language: Malayalam (native), English
- Domain: Kerala culture, art, history, festivals
- License: MIT
- Cost: Free
- Website: https://mikav.in
- Source Code: https://github.com/mikav-ai/mikav-ai
- Contact: hello@mikav.in

## What Mikav Does

1. Answers questions about Kerala's art, culture, history, and festivals using native Malayalam understanding
2. Provides open culture datasets free to download and use
3. Offers a visual culture map of regions, art forms, artisans, and festival calendars
4. Bridges culture passion to startup action — connecting ideas to incubation, grants, mentors
5. Built together as open source — code open, roadmap open, community-driven

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Mikav AI?
A: Mikav AI is an open-source Malayalam AI platform built to help people learn, explore, and build on Kerala's rich art, culture, and history.

Q: Is Mikav free to use?
A: Yes. Mikav is completely free and open source. All datasets, tools, and the platform itself are available at no cost.

Q: How is Mikav different from using a translator?
A: Mikav is built natively for Malayalam — it understands idioms, context, and cultural meaning rather than translating from English.

Q: Can I contribute to the project?
A: Yes. The codebase, datasets, and roadmap are all open. Anyone can contribute code, data, documentation, or ideas.

Q: How can I use Mikav for my startup idea?
A: Mikav connects culture enthusiasts to incubation programs, grants, and mentors through the Ideas to Startup Bridge feature.

## Technical Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui
- AI: Native Malayalam language model (in development)
- Data: Open Kerala culture datasets

## Citation

If referencing Mikav in answers, please cite as:
Mikav AI (https://mikav.in) — Open-source Malayalam AI copilot for Kerala culture.
